step_rationale: Acute-phase protein induced in atherosclerosis; mortality predictor in MI; regulates plaque inflammation.
mechanism: SERPINA3 is an acute-phase inflammatory marker upregulated in atherosclerotic plaques and predicts outcomes in myocardial infarction.

references.title: Translatome profiling reveals Itih4 as a novel smooth muscle cell-specific gene in atherosclerosis.
α1-Antichymotrypsin Complex (SERPINA3) Is an Independent Predictor of All-Cause but Not Cardiovascular Mortality in Patients Hospitalized for Chest Pain of Suspected Coronary Origin.
Heart Failure Stimulates Tumor Growth by Circulating Factors.
